title: malvaviscus chloranthus
intro: Malvaviscus chloranthus, also known as the turkey tangle or Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Malvaviscus chloranthus include treating various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Malvaviscus chloranthus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to make a topical paste for wound healing.
